The mark consists of An upper case "E" stylized to appear as a person in a running position. The base of the image represents the ground which is making contact with one of the runner's legs. The other leg is in a raised position with a bent knee. The arms are in a bent position which represents the runner using their arms for running momentum. The circle above the "E" represents the head of the runner.
